text_block_list.name: Training Club Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Wow～! Another new personal best!? That's amazing, Tsurumaru! 
Even though you just joined the club!

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I'll shave off eeeeeven more time next time! 
I'm a future Triple Crown Horsegirl, after all!

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
If I have talent, I have to polish it! 
I can put in more, much more—effort!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ngh!? Yaaawn…— 
…Ah, 3 AM again…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: (My plans with Trainer aren't until noon. Today…—)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: —I won't let even this time go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Personal training with Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi begins tomorrow. 
I hum a tune as I plan out what kind of regimen to put her through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …I smile wryly at myself for getting ahead of myself like that. Just as I pick up my smartphone, getting ready to sleep—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly crawl into bed. The alarm is set. 
Now I just need to close my eyes…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
…And here I am, having not slept a wink. 
The air on the morning track is so clear…
choice_data_list: <size=38>(I was so excited I couldn't sleep at all…)</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Haah, haah… Ugh… Whoooaaa～～…!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Mmm～… Mmm… Hm? Wait… A bed…? 
Where am I—… —Gasp!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I had her examined just in case, but they said she had no fever and nothing was particularly wrong. When I asked her why she was so dizzy, then—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry, I'm so sorry!! 
I just woke up really early this morning, so um…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd do 50 laps as a warm-up…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Augh～ I guess it was～

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
B-But still, my legs are completely warmed up! 
How about we hit the track right now! I can still sprint at full speed from here—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Bwaah!?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: T-T-That was just me tripping over my own feet! I'm fine! Perfectly fine! I caught my fall perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
W-W-Waaah～～!? Please don't worry so much. 
I'm completely fine! See!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I have no fever, and my legs don't hurt. 
So let's head out to the outer track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
…Normally, I should send her home to rest immediately. 
But I feel bad just leaving her alone in this state. The best compromise I can make is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I brought her to a ramen shop near the academy. Having a meal and talking about our next steps should help calm her down.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: ～～～! I see, "food" is also crucial for an athlete! Nutrition and calories are directly linked to building up your body, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Now's the time to show my dedication. 
…Tsuyoshi will now challenge the limits of her stomach.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
—Boss, give me the Mega-Sized Special Mountain-High Noodles! 
10 Horsegirl servings, please!!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Dear Tsuru has an upset stomach and is resting today～
choice_data_list: <size=38>Ah… Yeah… Thanks for letting me know…</size>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And I also have a letter from her for you～

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: She says, "I will expand my stomach so I can finish the whole thing next time. I've already thought up a strategy."
choice_data_list: <size=38>…? Let me read it for now</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I open the envelope I received from Mejiro Bright. The very first line reads—『Tsuyoshi's 10 Bowls of Ramen Grand Strategy!』
choice_data_list: <size=36>(Ahaha… She must have been really frustrated)</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rest is written in somewhat shaky handwriting. 
『1. Eat meat regularly』 『2. Ask the regulars for tips』

text_block_list.name: Letter from Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
『3. Become someone who can eat to their heart's content!』 
『4. Grow into someone who will leave Trainer amazed!』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As the list goes on, it turns less into strategies and more into declarations of her enthusiasm. But in every single line, Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi's positivity shines through—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I trace my fingers over the powerful emotions hidden behind the weak, shaky handwriting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: …Dear Tsuru always gives her all in everything she does.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …Is she tossing and turning in bed right now, coming up with countermeasures all on her own? If she is—
choice_data_list: <size=38>…I need to work even harder too!</size>
<size=38>…I need to work even harder too!</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
—I can't let her do all the hard work alone. 
It's still provisional, but I'm her trainer now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Exactly. 
Please be sure to share those feelings with dear Tsuru.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And if I may… 
Could I ask one favor of you?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Zzz… Zzz～… 
Mmm… Nnh…

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Cough, cough!! Hack!! Yikes～ 
A fever again… I'll have to skip the club today…

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: —But I can still study races at home! I can watch videos and read books! It's fine, there are still things I can work hard on!

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …Ngh. Even if my legs hurt, I can still stretch my shoulders! I'll make them super flexible… The teachers will be so surprised♪

text_block_list.name: Training Club Teacher
text_block_list.text: Tsurumaru! Is your body already—

text_block_list.name: Club Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Tsuru! Everyone's times are posted over there! 
Do you want to go see them too!?

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Really!? Sorry, Teacher, we'll talk later! 
Umm, my time is—

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…Dead last. 
————……

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Well, of course it is!!

text_block_list.name: Young Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Everyone else has been working hard too! Plus, 
I—I just haven't been putting in as much effort as everyone else!
